feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can the field Location be selected correctly?
entry.content:
Hi Community Expert,

Can the field Locatin be selected correctly? or only SAP successfactors related location can be selected? I want to choose SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, but it failed....

entry.title: Cannot see community.sap.com attached graphs
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I am trying to see the entire content of the following blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/same-day-ach-how-to-set-up-your-sap-system-1-of-2/ba-p/13133409#:~:text=Same%2DDay%20ACH%20lessens%20outstanding,three%20settlement%20windows%20each%20day.

but only the text is shown, when I try to display/download the graphs, I receive the following error:

403. That’s an error.

Your client does not have permission to get URL /gsBIXI-VD6YqHD_U-DayhzGfP7YDwbuYgPGxp5w34Car4pbCmujKSSZFz7hN8A9XxfMp-xsrm94oVDMJhNeLT8zY-30tpWc7DJEr099My2OfObsxUVXoZ9xiByAybiUW3NoWcqM from this server. (Client IP address: 147.161.190.118)
ACL Denied That’s all we know.

Please help.

Regards, Armando

entry.title: How to setup a network printer which is on-premise in SAP Rise Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you share the steps for setting up  a network printer which is on-premise in SAP Rise Private Cloud Edition

 

Regards

Venkat

entry.title: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Hello poweruser of this community platform!

I have recently experienced a situation where a question in the Technology area got my attention and I did not feel like my response was wroth an answer but rather a comment. I needed to add some lines of code but in the comment section I can only hit enter to submit my post but have no option to add formatted text like a list of entries or even a code snippet. Can someone link me a guide or tell me how to do it?

Kind regards!

PS: Or is it simply "open a new tab, start a question and use the editor, copy the text and insert it in the comment field + close the question tab"?

entry.title: qa32 350 movement
entry.content:
Hi,

We transfer the stock from the quality stock to blocked stock. The movement type is 350. We try to reversal this movement with 349 but it is wasn't able to do this on migo and also bapi. So that's why we used 343 movement on migo and on MB52 screen stock move from blocked to unrestricted stock. But on Qa32 we still see the stock on blocked stock. How can we solve this? Also another strugle is when we use the 343, we want to use BAPI; but we take error M7 096. Could you please help about this.

entry.title: Polluted by many questions NOT about SAP Websites in Community 2024
entry.content:
There are two big issues in the Q&A of Community 2024: people using the button "Answer" (means "give solution") to just comment without giving a solution (the issue was addressed, let's see if that improves), and the other one is:

Half of my inbox is polluted by people asking a non-SAP-Websites question in the group "Question about SAP Websites".

The reason is clear for me, they don't know where to post their SAP question, even if they search, they don't find the right group:

  • The top menu contains "Products and Technology > Questions about SAP Websites", they choose it because they don't see a group corresponding to their question and because it contains the word "SAP" (lazy solution of course).
  • The top level "Create a post" is missing a search field, so they can't find easily, and they choose the easiest choice "Questions about SAP Websites".

     

  • Even if a search field existed, make sure to extend the search to the group description, e.g. there's no group "sap business one", the right group is ERP Q&A ("SAP Business One" is in the group description):

The six first months, I did tell the Original Poster that the question was posted to the wrong group, then I decided to alert the moderator to move the question to the right group.

No idea what's the best solution.

Is that in the list of planned enhancements? If not, could you add it?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: DDIC_ACTIVATION TP_STEP_FAILURE 0008
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

System: ECC 6.0

DB: Oracle 11 G

OS: HP Unix

I an Upgrading SAP_Basis Component patch level 17 Release 740. During import we stuck with DDIC_Activation phase first, due to duplicate structure of WLFS_IDOC_LIST_OUT.

So we deleted the duplicate structure of WLFS_IDOC_LIST_OUT, and try to proceed further but again this time we got one more error.

- Error in phase: DDIC_ACTIVATION

- Reason for error: TP_STEP_FAILURE

- Return code: 0008

- Error message: OCS Package SAPK74000ICPSAPBASIS, tp step "A",
return code 0008

we just looking for the solution from the SAP expertise, thanks in Advance whoever looking and providing support on this.

Thanks & Regards,

  Ansar sheikh

entry.title: Wanted to Hide Form Settings in the Menu Bar in SAP Business One
entry.content: I wanted to hide the Form Settings button in the Main Menu marked in the attached screenshot, is there a way in SAP Business One for 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.240) SP 2402 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit) ?

entry.title: Set parameter id storage capacity
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to use SET PARAMETER ID concept in my code.

Can you confirm at maximum how much length text i can store in 1 parameter id when i am storing value for only 1 field.

I am getting answers like maximum 20 character and maximum 70 character.

So, which one is correct? 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regard,

Praveen S

entry.title: Issues with creating Signup page
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am trying to create a Signup page for my app, I followed closely some videos I saw on youtube as well as do some reading around, just to fix it but I dont seem to see where the problem is. I have been stuck and I believe assistance from anyone at this point might help. Thank you

entry.title: IPS Trasformation add Org Member Roles
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to read users from the SAP IAS and automatically assign Org Members via IPS SAP BTP Type Platform Members (Cloud Foundry).
I have made the configuration.
https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-provisioning/identity-provisioning/sap-btp-platform-members-cloud-foundry-f5cefa9509d64b0a8aeab24a895feec5
With the default transformation I get the following error
group:b499810c-3102-4a73-84ae-7aa78c97e542,
system=MyTargetSystem,
time=2025-01-28T12:31:00.382+00,
error=Unable to write entity to target system with name rd-tgt-btp-rs-u-cloudfoundry-Administrator Caused by: An unparsed group id must have exactly 2 or 3 logical parts,
content={“displayName”:“Org Manager”,“members”:[{“$ref”:“https://myhost.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users/50c58b3b-347c-4ae0-8c7f-86a9b50780c2”,“type”:“User”,“value”:“50c58b3b-347c-4ae0-8c7f-86a9b50780c2”}],“urn:sap☁️scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group”:{“name”:“org_manager”}}
I think it is missing
//the organization group extension name follows the pattern: <org_ID> <org_role>
But I don't understand how to insert this into the transformation.
Greetings Dirk

entry.title: material availability date is before sales order creation date
entry.content:
Hello,

We are experiencing issues with a few sales orders where the material availability date is being determined before the order creation date.

We have checked the scheduling settings for the sales document type in SPRO, and backward scheduling is not enabled.

What could be the possible reason for this?

Thank you in advance for your response.

entry.title: create a blog button is disabled. Could anyone please help me to enable it.
SAP IRPA can you help me recognize button?
entry.content:
Hi experts, I wonder if someone has idea what could be wrong with recognizing these buttons as collection? On captured screen, when declaring it, it seems criteria are enough like this:

But when putting this to loop, it makes for some reason 4 Iterations and presses something in the upper left part of the browser:

Any idea what may be wrong with the definition? Many thanks

entry.title: How can I extract the reference number from the <Ustrd> tag in an EBS file?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the <Ustrd> tag. When reading an EBS file, the reference number is typically found within this tag. However, there is also additional text next to the reference number that is not needed for my use case. How can I extract only the reference number from this tag?

Is there a method to parse the content of the <Ustrd> tag and retrieve just the reference number, excluding the other text? Any advice on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Handling Overflow of Characters in <Ustrd> Tag During EBS File Processing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the processing of EBS files using program FF_5. In the case of the <Ustrd> tag, which typically holds reference information, the tag is limited to 140 characters. However, if the content exceeds this limit and contains more than 140 characters, I would like to know how SAP handles this scenario.

  • Does SAP FF_5 read only the first 140 characters and ignore the rest, or is there any way for SAP to process the additional characters?
  • If SAP does ignore the additional characters, what happens to them? Are they lost, or is there any functionality in place to capture the overflow (for example, moving the extra text to another field or row)?

Any insights or recommendations for handling this situation would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: What kind of html tags are supported?
entry.content:
Everytime i write a blog post and paste html content in or edit and old blog post i get the error that some html tags are unsupported.
Unfortunately i don´t get which one are supported and which not.

Is there a overview of all allowed/supprted html tags so i can avoid or correct it?

entry.title: Badges are not showing
entry.content: Why my earned badges are not showing in my profile that  i have earned in sap tutorial .

entry.title: After registering with universal ID, I am unable to login to my older profile and access my blog
entry.content:
HI,

I have posted a blog back in 2023 using my S user id. I recently created a universal ID and linked it to my S user id. However, now I am not able to access my blog post.

This new account

1. Doesn't show my blog post in "My posts". 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-optimize-the-technical-monitoring-of-application-in-solution-manager/ba-p/13549991

2. Doesn't allow me to post any blog at all.

How can I get my access back?

Please help!.

Thanks,

Aditya.

entry.title: Prevent reprinting the Payment Advice in F110 on S4HC?
entry.content:
Can anyone please tell me how to prevent the reprinting of Payment Advice forms in F110 on S4HC? My client wants to allow printing only once.

The standard system currently allows me to download the Payment Advice every time I enter the Identification, but I need it to restrict access after the first download.
